description: Remove stubborn dirt and stains for your leather, smooth leather, canvas, nylon rubber and vinyl products with ease with this boot Sauce Cleaner Gel from timberland. This water-based cleaning gel comes in a squeezable tube with a buoilt-in sponge applicator for easy usage.This gel is ideal for most types of footwear, but it is not recommended for use on suede and nubuck leather.InstructionsFirst test on a small area as the gel may alter the colour of the product slightlyClean surface dirt with a damp, clean cloth or soft bristled brushSqueeze a small amount of the gel onto the in-built sponge applicator and work it into the soiled areaWipe away the excess gel with a clean, damp cloth and allow it to dry
